news.title: Michelin-starred chef Sidney Schutte to open new restaurant in former gym in Amsterdam-Zuid - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

Michelin-starred chef Sidney Schutte is opening a new restaurant in Amsterdam-Zuid, converting a former gym into the dining space. This is noteworthy for food enthusiasts visiting Amsterdam, as Schutte's Michelin recognition signals high-quality cuisine. The unique location in a converted gym adds architectural and design interest to the dining experience, making it a promising new destination for fine dining in the city's south district.

news.title: Denk mee over de toekomst van horeca op de Wallen - Gemeente Amsterdam
news.summary:
# Summary

The municipality of Amsterdam is inviting public input on the future of hospitality and food establishments (horeca) in the Red Light District (De Wallen). While no specific restaurant is mentioned, this is relevant for visitors because it signals potential changes to the dining and drinking venues in Amsterdam's most famous neighborhood. Anyone planning to visit the Wallen should be aware that new regulations or policies may affect which restaurants and bars operate there.

news.title: Dief laat zich ‘opsluiten’ in Antwerps restaurant en maakt buit ter waarde van 8.000 euro: “Bijna lachwekkend hoe hij zichzelf daarna de das omdeed” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

A thief deliberately allowed himself to be locked inside an Antwerp restaurant after closing, stealing approximately €8,000 in valuables before making a comically failed escape attempt that led to his capture. Visitors to Antwerp should be aware of this security incident at a local restaurant, though the thief's poor execution suggests the establishment has since likely improved its security measures.

news.title: Restaurante, sala de provas, museu e eventos dão vida à Geradora da Tapada da Ajuda - Expresso
news.summary:
# Summary

The Geradora da Tapada da Ajuda in Lisbon has reopened as a multifunctional venue combining a restaurant, tasting room, museum, and event space. Visitors to the city can enjoy dining and cultural experiences in a restored historic location that celebrates local heritage and food culture. This destination offers a unique blend of gastronomy, education, and entertainment in one venue.
